<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
<title>Test</title>
<style>
:root {
    --nav-bg: #333;
    --text-light: #fff;
    --font-main: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;
}
body {
    margin: 0;
    font-family: var(--font-main);
}
nav {
    background: var(--nav-bg);
    color: var(--text-light);
    padding: 1rem;
}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<nav>nav</nav>
</body>
</html>
